meta.title: Close Linkage between Genetic Loci Controlling Response of Fowl to Subgroup A and Subgroup C Sarcoma Viruses

abstractHtml: Cells from the F1 and F2 embryos derived from a cross between C/AC and C/O parents were examined for the degree of linkage between the tva and tvc loci. Genetic analysis of the results suggested that in the population under study these two loci are closely but not completely linked. The linkage value estimated on a pooled sex basis was 0.08 ± 0.03.
